changeSet.author: nationlens
nationlens
nationlens

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_insights WHERE title_en = 'Parliamentary Attendance Trends 2024'

column.name: body_en
column.value: AI insight placeholder: Average MP attendance in the 2024 parliament session stood at 73%. MPs from northern states showed higher question-raising activity. Data sourced from Lok Sabha records.

column.name: body_hi
column.value: AI इनसाइट प्लेसहोल्डर: 2024 संसद सत्र में औसत सांसद उपस्थिति 73% रही। उत्तरी राज्यों के सांसदों ने प्रश्न पूछने में अधिक सक्रियता दिखाई।

changeSet.author: nationlens

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM media_mappings WHERE display_context = 'HOME'

changeSet.author: nationlens
changeSet.sql: UPDATE media_mappings mm JOIN media_links ml ON ml.id = mm.media_link_id SET mm.audience_scope = 'NATIONAL' WHERE mm.display_context = 'BROWSE' AND ml.approval_status = 'APPROVED' AND mm.audience_scope = 'NATIONAL';
